_meta.description: Single source of truth for all numeric claims in the paper. Every number in the manuscript MUST trace back to a key here.

bct_total_tonnes_dune.note: Dune query confirmation matches RPC-derived 21984482 within 65 tonnes

pqd_biochar_lo.note: Pacific Biochar CA (C005), composite=83.275, rounded from 0.167

redd_pqd_lo.note: REDD+ pool lower annotation bound; pool-level PQD=0.681 rounded up

redd_pqd_hi.note: REDD+ project archetype mean PQD from 45 batch-scored credits

pqd_industrial_gas_lo.note: Industrial gas destruction lower bound; HFC-23 archetype PQD=0.713, annotation interpolation

token_diversity_q1.note: Distinct composite scores in Q1 (n=219 original-scored deposits, blocks 20.2M-20.7M)

token_diversity_q4.note: Distinct composite scores in Q4 (n=220 original-scored deposits, blocks 36.8M-37.0M)

early_exit_block_range_lo.note: Median deposit block for Waste/Methane type (20.4M); lowest median among early-exit types

early_exit_block_range_hi.note: Median deposit block for ARR type (21.7M); highest median among early-exit types

renewable_exit_block.note: Median deposit block for Renewable type (32.6M, n=707 original-scored deposits)
